summary: South Bay startups are on a funding tear: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) and Ayar Labs (San Jose) each pulled in $500M this spring, while SiFive, Rhoda AI, and a dozen others landed nine-figure rounds across AI, robotics, and semiconductors. Most of the region's tech workforce is hiring or stable, though a couple firms are tightening belts. A panel on AI's social costs kicks off Friday at San Jose State.
